title: The Very Hungry Caterpillar
author: Eric Carle
shortDescription: Follow a tiny caterpillar as he munches his way through the week. A colorful story about counting, food, and growing up.

title: Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See?
author: Bill Martin Jr.
shortDescription: Meet a cheerful parade of colorful animals in this rhythmic picture book. Its repeating words make it fun to read aloud.

title: The Gruffalo
author: Julia Donaldson
shortDescription: A clever little mouse invents a fearsome creature while walking through the forest. But what happens when the creature turns out to be real?

title: Where the Wild Things Are
author: Maurice Sendak
shortDescription: Sail away with Max to a land filled with wild creatures and exciting adventures. This imaginative story celebrates bravery, feelings, and home.

title: Dinosaurs Before Dark
author: Mary Pope Osborne
shortDescription: Jack and Annie discover a magical tree house that carries them back to the age of dinosaurs. Their first time-traveling adventure is full of mystery and excitement.

title: The Secret Garden
author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
shortDescription: Mary discovers a hidden garden and begins an unforgettable journey of friendship and healing. A timeless adventure about hope, nature, and new beginnings.

title: Peter Pan
author: J. M. Barrie
shortDescription: Fly to Neverland with Peter Pan, Wendy, and the Lost Boys. Their magical adventure is filled with pirates, fairies, and daring escapes.

title: Cinderella
author: Brothers Grimm
shortDescription: With a little magic and plenty of courage, Cinderella attends a royal ball. Discover a classic tale of kindness, hope, and dreams coming true.

title: Beauty and the Beast
author: Gabrielle-Suzanne de Villeneuve
shortDescription: Belle learns that kindness and love can be found in unexpected places. This enchanting fairy tale reminds readers that true beauty comes from within.

title: Goodnight Moon
author: Margaret Wise Brown
shortDescription: Say goodnight to everything in a cozy little room. Gentle words and calming pictures make this a comforting bedtime favorite.

title: The Going to Bed Book
author: Sandra Boynton
shortDescription: A boat full of silly animals gets ready for bed together. Its playful rhymes make bedtime cheerful and relaxing.

title: Ada Twist, Scientist
author: Andrea Beaty
shortDescription: Curious Ada asks questions, investigates clues, and never gives up on a puzzle. Her story encourages young readers to explore the world through science.

title: National Geographic Little Kids First Big Book of Why
author: Amy Shields
shortDescription: Discover simple answers to the big questions curious children love to ask. Bright photographs and fun facts make learning exciting.

title: Highlights Big Fun Activity Book
author: Highlights
shortDescription: Enjoy puzzles, mazes, matching games, and drawing activities on every page. This activity book helps children learn while having fun.

title: Awesome Science Experiments for Kids
author: Crystal Chatterton
shortDescription: Try exciting hands-on experiments using easy-to-find materials. Young scientists can explore chemistry, biology, physics, and more.

title: The Cat in the Hat
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: A rainy day becomes an unforgettable adventure when the Cat in the Hat arrives. Playful rhymes help early readers build confidence.

title: Frog and Toad Are Friends
author: Arnold Lobel
shortDescription: Frog and Toad share simple adventures through every season. Their warm and funny stories celebrate the joy of true friendship.

title: Ang Alamat ng Ampalaya
author: Augie Rivera
shortDescription: Alamin kung paano nagkaroon ng iba't ibang katangian ang mapait na ampalaya. Isang makulay na kuwentong nagtuturo tungkol sa inggit at pagtanggap sa sarili.

title: Sandosenang Sapatos
author: Luis P. Gatmaitan
shortDescription: Isang mapagmahal na ama ang gumagawa ng magagandang sapatos para sa kaniyang mga anak. Ang kuwentong ito ay tungkol sa pamilya, pangarap, at walang hanggang pagmamahal.

title: May Higante sa Aming Bahay
author: Rhandee Garlitos
shortDescription: May isang higanteng nakatira sa bahay, ngunit baka hindi siya nakakatakot gaya ng inaakala. Isang magiliw na kuwento tungkol sa pamilya at pagmamahal.

title: Si Pagong at si Matsing
author: Traditional Filipino Folktale
shortDescription: Sundan sina Pagong at Matsing sa isang nakatutuwang kuwento tungkol sa puno ng saging. Itinuturo ng klasikong kuwentong-bayan na mahalaga ang talino, tiyaga, at pagiging patas.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J. K. Rowling
shortDescription: Harry Potter discovers he is a wizard and begins his first year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. Alongside new friends, he uncovers magical secrets and faces an unforgettable adventure.

title: Winnie-the-Pooh
author: A. A. Milne
shortDescription: Join Winnie-the-Pooh and his friends from the Hundred Acre Wood on heartwarming adventures filled with friendship, kindness, and imagination.

title: Curious George
author: H. A. Rey
shortDescription: Curious George's playful adventures often lead to unexpected surprises. This classic story encourages curiosity, creativity, and learning through fun.

title: The Tale of Peter Rabbit
author: Beatrix Potter
shortDescription: Peter Rabbit sneaks into Mr. McGregor's garden despite his mother's warning. A timeless tale about curiosity, courage, and learning from mistakes.

title: Green Eggs and Ham
author: Dr. Seuss
shortDescription: Sam-I-Am encourages his friend to try a new meal in this playful rhyming classic. A delightful story about keeping an open mind and trying new things.

title: The Rainbow Fish
author: Marcus Pfister
shortDescription: The most beautiful fish in the ocean learns that true happiness comes from sharing with others. A beloved picture book about kindness and friendship.

title: Charlotte's Web
author: E. B. White
shortDescription: Wilbur the pig and Charlotte the spider form an unforgettable friendship. This timeless classic celebrates kindness, loyalty, and the power of true friendship.

title: Alamat ng Pinya
author: Traditional Filipino Folktale
shortDescription: A classic Filipino folktale about Pinang, a young girl who learns the importance of obedience and responsibility. A timeless story that teaches valuable life lessons.

title: Ibong Adarna
author: Traditional Filipino Epic
shortDescription: Prince Don Juan embarks on a magical journey to capture the legendary Ibong Adarna. This Filipino literary classic is filled with adventure, courage, and family devotion.
